rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly investigates the same core mechanism (training robotic control policies within a learned world model) and measures the same dependent variable (real-robot performance) as the user's question regarding "In-Context World Modeling for Robotic Control," even though it focuses on RL finetuning rather than the specific "In-Context" prompting mechanism.
